prose: The Fukui reactivity index calculation was performed at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level using the chemkit DFT engine in gas phase. The calculated maximum Fukui index for electrophilic attack is approximately 0.59595, indicating the most electrophilic site on the formaldehyde molecule.
